journey.title: My Journey
journey.name: Name
journey.motivation_beginner: You're building a strong foundation — every session counts.
journey.motivation_intermediate: You're making real progress — keep pushing forward.
journey.motivation_advanced: You're at an elite level — consistency is your superpower.

pelvic_tilt.name: Pelvic Tilt
pelvic_tilt.description: Find the muscles and learn to tilt the pelvis for blood flow. Lie on your back with knees bent, gently tilt your pelvis upward, then release.

marching_feet_bridge.name: Marching Feet Bridge
marching_feet_bridge.description: Lie on your back in bridge position. Alternate lifting each foot off the ground while maintaining hip height. Builds pelvic stability.

bent_leg_kickback.name: Bent Leg Kickback
bent_leg_kickback.description: On all fours, kick one bent leg back and up, squeezing the glute at the top. Alternate legs. Activates the glute-pelvic connection.

heel_glute_bridge.name: Heel Glute Bridge
heel_glute_bridge.description: Strengthen the glute-pelvic floor connection. Push through your heels to lift your hips, squeeze at the top, then lower with control.

hip_abduction.name: Hip Abduction
hip_abduction.description: Lie on your side and lift the top leg, keeping hips stacked. Strengthens the outer hip and pelvic stabilizers.

bridge_abduction.name: Bridge Abduction
bridge_abduction.description: In a glute bridge position, push knees apart against a resistance band. Combines bridge strength with abduction for pelvic power.

rear_decline_bridge.name: Rear Decline Bridge
rear_decline_bridge.description: Maximum pressure to trap blood in the penis. Feet elevated on a surface, drive hips up with full glute engagement. The most intense bridge variation.

frog_reverse_hyperextension.name: Frog Reverse Hyperextension
frog_reverse_hyperextension.description: Lie face down on a bench with legs in a frog position. Lift legs by squeezing glutes. Targets deep pelvic floor muscles with high intensity.

sidekick_with_bent_knee.name: Sidekick with Bent Knee
sidekick_with_bent_knee.description: On all fours, kick one bent leg out to the side at hip height. Builds lateral pelvic stability under load.

child_pose.name: Child Pose
child_pose.description: The ultimate reset to drop and relax the pelvic floor. Kneel and sit back on your heels, stretch arms forward, breathe deeply into your belly.

cat_cow_stretch.name: Cat Cow Stretch
cat_cow_stretch.description: On all fours, alternate between arching your back and rounding it. Releases pelvic floor tension and improves body awareness.

prone_stretch.name: Prone Stretch
prone_stretch.description: Lie face down and gently press up through your hands, stretching the front of your body. Opens the hip flexors and releases pelvic tension.

lying_butterfly.name: Lying Butterfly
lying_butterfly.description: Stretching the adductors to prevent tension spikes. Lie on your back, soles of feet together, let knees fall open. Breathe and release.

rocking_frog_stretch.name: Rocking Frog Stretch
rocking_frog_stretch.description: In a wide-knee position, rock forward and back gently. Deeply stretches the inner thighs and pelvic floor for better relaxation control.

cat_cow_advanced.name: Cat Cow Advanced
cat_cow_advanced.description: Deeper cat cow with intentional pelvic floor engagement. Focus on fully relaxing the floor during cow and gently lifting during cat.

90_to_90_advanced.name: 90 to 90 Advanced
90_to_90_advanced.description: Extreme hip opening for maximum endurance. Sit with legs in 90-90 position, rotate your torso over the front leg, return to center.

figure_4_spinal_rotation.name: Figure 4 Spinal Rotation
figure_4_spinal_rotation.description: Lie on your back, cross one ankle over the opposite knee, rotate the stacked legs to one side. Deep release for the pelvic floor and hips.

90_to_90_transitions.name: 90 to 90 Transitions
90_to_90_transitions.description: Sit in 90-90, smoothly transition legs to the opposite 90-90 position. Builds fluid hip mobility essential for stamina control.

kneeling_ab_draw_in.name: Kneeling Ab Draw In
kneeling_ab_draw_in.description: Syncing your breath and deep core with your floor. On all fours, exhale and draw your belly button to your spine, engaging the pelvic floor.

pelvic_tilt_breathing.name: Pelvic Tilt Breathing
pelvic_tilt_breathing.description: Lie on your back, gently tilt your pelvis while exhaling. Coordinate breath with movement to build the core-floor connection.

marching_bridge_hold.name: Marching Bridge Hold
marching_bridge_hold.description: In bridge position, alternate lifting each knee toward your chest while keeping hips level. Builds endurance in the pelvic stabilizers.

glute_march.name: Glute March
glute_march.description: Holding pelvic strength while legs are in motion. In bridge position, march legs with control while maintaining a strong hip lift.

rocking_frog_hold.name: Rocking Frog Hold
rocking_frog_hold.description: Wide-knee frog position with a hold at the deepest point. Builds both stretch tolerance and pelvic floor endurance under tension.

abduction_march.name: Abduction March
abduction_march.description: In bridge position, alternate between abducting knees and marching. Combines multiple demands on the pelvic floor for functional endurance.

squat_side_bends.name: Squat Side Bends
squat_side_bends.description: Maintaining pelvic floor stability under a heavy load. In a squat stance, perform side bends while keeping the pelvic floor engaged throughout.

90_to_90_endurance.name: 90 to 90 Endurance
90_to_90_endurance.description: In 90-90 position, rotate and hold at end range. Challenges the pelvic floor to maintain stability during prolonged loaded positions.

sidekick_endurance.name: Sidekick Endurance
sidekick_endurance.description: On all fours, extend leg to the side and hold at the top. Sustained lateral pelvic demand builds lasting endurance.

exercise_intro.title: Here's how to do it
exercise_intro.instruction: Squeeze your pelvic floor muscles — the same ones you'd use to stop urinating midstream. Hold tight during CONTRACT, release fully during RELAX.

timer.quit_confirm: Are you sure you want to quit?

workout.title: Choose Your Workout
workout.beginner_desc: Perfect for getting started. Build your foundation.
workout.intermediate_desc: Step it up. Increase hold times and reps.
